name: Jerk Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Cider vinegar or white vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the onion and scallion.
2. Measure 2 teaspoons of fresh thyme leaves.
3. Add salt, sugar, ground Jamaican allspice, nutmeg, cinnamon, hot pepper, and black pepper to a bowl.
4. Mix in 3 tablespoons of soy sauce, 1 tablespoon of cooking oil, and 1 tablespoon of cider vinegar or white vinegar.
5. Use a food processor with a steel blade for best results.
6. This marinade is suitable for chicken, beef, or pork.
7. Store any leftover marinade in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to one month.
